3007993.title: The Secret Diary of Desmond Pfeiffer

pageprops.defaultsort: Secret Diary of Desmond Pfeiffer, The

3007993.extract: The Secret Diary of Desmond Pfeiffer ( pə-FY-fər) is a short-lived American sitcom that aired on UPN from October 5 to October 26, 1998. Before it even debuted, the series set off a storm of controversy because of a perceived light-hearted take on the issue of American slavery.
